source_pr.title: ddl: migrate test-infra to testify for ddl.testSerialDBSuite

symptoms: sort.Slice(endStates, func(i, j int) bool { return endStates[i] < endStates[j] }) (ddl/db_test.go)
failure_signature: sort.Slice(endStates, func(i, j int) bool { return endStates[i] < endStates[j] }) (ddl/db_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates the DDL serial test suite from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Test-framework migration / suite refactor can stabilize suite lifecycle and reduce flakiness introduced by deprecated test frameworks.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy gocheck-based DDL tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: sort.Slice(endStates, func(i, j int) bool { return endStates[i] < endStates[j] }) (ddl/db_test.go)
